---
title: "Publications"
description: "Publications from CogDyn Lab"
bibliography: publications.bib
nocite: |
  @*
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page is connected to `publications.bib`. Replace the sample BibTeX entries with real publications. Quarto will render the bibliography automatically.
:::

## Selected publications

Add a short curated list here if you want to highlight representative work.

## Full list

::: {#refs}
:::
